_comment: Harness-only configuration overlay for connector_harness.py. Adjacent file to sources.json: sources.json is the canonical connector inventory (curated by humans), and this file adds harness-only fields (test_bbox, test_acreage, expected_bbox, parcel_id_field, redaction_extra_fields) that do not belong in sources.json. The harness reads BOTH files at startup and merges by county key. Adding a county to the harness = add the sources.json entry AND add the overlay here. Phase 2 seeds Fulton only (per BUILD_PHASES.md L50-L60).
_maintainer: Land-Research three-agent code team. See appendix_a_county_connectors.md and reviews/03_phase2_connector_harness/01_risk_review.md (Agent 1).

test_bbox._comment: South Fulton / Campbellton-Fairburn industrial corridor; appendix L266-L268. Used as the known-good-query envelope.

test_acreage._comment: Standard industrial site target; matches parameters.json hard_filters.acreage_min/max (5-50). Risk review §3.6 set this as the default.

expected_bbox._comment: WGS84 envelope of Fulton County (approximate). Used by geometry_validation to assert returned features are within county extent (with 0.5-degree tolerance ~50km, per check_geometry_validation in connector_harness.py). Key naming uses xmin/ymin/xmax/ymax to match GIS convention and the test_bbox keys above.

redaction_extra_fields: _comment_for_humans: any additional API field names whose values should be replaced with [REDACTED] before serialization, beyond the logical-name-driven defaults in connector_harness.py.
fulton_ga._optional_fields_comment: API field names whose 0% population is informational rather than a connector failure. Phase 2 fix-forward verified live: Subdiv is genuinely sparse on raw industrial parcels in South Fulton (most don't belong to a named subdivision); the field is still reported in field_population.rates for human review.
